backend/main.mo: Actor implements message storage, user profiles, trusted contacts, and access-controlled APIs with E2EE fields and authorization mixin.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module converts old message structures to new ones by renaming keyId to encryptedSymmetricKey.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping E2EE, decryption, and key‑field‑naming features to related frontend files and components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries of all major frontend files, describing their purpose and behavior in the app.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base styles defining OKLCH color tokens for light and dark themes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point loading the React application via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app configuring TanStack Router routes and wrapping content with theming and notifications.
frontend/src/components/auth/AuthGate.ts: Auth gate that enforces Internet Identity login and triggers profile setup for new users.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Login/logout button integrating Internet Identity with loading states and query cache clearing.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/TokenL: Displays token ledger diagnostics, supports refresh and copying a JSON report to clipboard.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/TokenR: Shows a token receiving address with copy-to-clipboard functionality and fallback when unavailable.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/TokenS: Provides a form to send tokens with validation, configuration checks, and simulated send behavior.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Tokens: Renders receive/send panels for multiple tokens using tabs and configuration metadata.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Transp: Shows transport key diagnostic status and allows copying a JSON diagnostic report.
frontend/src/components/landing/Unauthen: Public landing page highlighting features and offering login access.
Main app layout with navigation, header, footer, and wrapped page content.
frontend/src/components/messages/Diagnos: UI panel that displays send-eligibility diagnostics and allows copying detailed JSON info to the clipboard.
frontend/src/components/messages/Iso2002: Form-based ISO20022 message editor with live raw preview generation.
frontend/src/components/messages/RawPrev: Displays raw message text in a styled card with a copy-to-clipboard action.
frontend/src/components/messages/SwiftCo: Form-based SWIFT MT message editor that updates and previews generated raw output.
frontend/src/config/tokens.ts: Defines token configurations and utilities for ledger ID checks, lookup, and glyph retrieval.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to Internet Identity, refreshing dependent queries on change.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity auth context, login/clear actions, and state management for identities.
frontend/src/hooks/useProfiles.ts: React Query hooks for fetching and saving user profiles through the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks to fetch messages and send new encrypted messages via the actor, with cache invalidation on send.
frontend/src/hooks/useSyncStatus.ts: Defines a hook to query relationship sync status for a given principal using the actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useTokenLedgerDiagnos: Runs token ledger configuration checks and fetches ICRC ledger metadata for diagnostics using React Query.
frontend/src/hooks/useTransportKey.ts: Manages generating, restoring, and registering local transport keypairs tied to vetKeys, including persistence and profile updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useTrustedContacts.ts: Provides hooks to fetch, add, remove, and check trusted contacts through the actor with query invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Configures Tailwind base styles and theme variables for light/dark modes with custom color tokens.
frontend/src/lib/crypto/e2ee.ts: Implements hybrid RSA-OAEP + AES-GCM encryption and decryption for end-to-end encrypted message payloads.
frontend/src/lib/crypto/transportKeys.ts: Generates, exports, imports, and manages RSA-OAEP transport keypairs for local secure storage.
frontend/src/lib/icrc/icrcLedgerClient.t: Creates a read‑only ICRC ledger actor and fetches basic metadata like name, symbol, decimals, and fee.
frontend/src/lib/messageFormats/iso20022: Defines ISO20022 message structure and utilities to create, serialize to XML, and parse payment messages.
frontend/src/lib/messageFormats/swift.ts: Defines the SwiftMessage structure with helpers to create, serialize, and parse SWIFT MT103-like messages.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with query and identity providers.
frontend/src/pages/ComposeMessagePage.ts: Provides a UI for composing ISO 20022 or SWIFT messages, handling recipient selection, sync checks, and encrypted sending.
frontend/src/pages/ContactsPage.tsx: Manages trusted contacts, displaying profiles, sync readiness, and allowing refresh or removal.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Shows user identity, transport key status, and tools to copy keys or navigate to composing messages.
frontend/src/pages/InboxPage.tsx: Lists sent and received messages with basic metadata and navigation to message details.
frontend/src/pages/MessageDetailPage.tsx: Displays a single message, decrypts content for recipients, and parses ISO 20022 or SWIFT formats.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSetupModal.tsx: Provides a modal form for entering and saving a user's name, handling validation, submission, and success/error toasts.
frontend/src/utils/base64.ts: Implements utility functions for converting between base64 strings, Uint8Array, and ArrayBuffer for storing binary data.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides helpers for reading URL parameters, persisting them in sessionStorage, and managing hash-based query cleanup.
frontend/src/utils/vetKey.ts: Manages session-scoped vetKey identifiers and related transport keypair storage, including generation, validation, and cleanup.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind CSS theme, colors, animations, and plugins such as typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Describes current project state focused on implementing end-to-end encrypted messaging, including features, requirements, and pending requests.
